market_pulse: Competitors are actively leveraging talent announcements (Tiësto, Steve Aoki, Alesso) and new dayclub openings (OMNIA Dayclub) while LIV maintains steady posting on beach residencies.

content_gaps.description: OMNIA, Hakkasan, and Zouk are front-loading DJ/artist announcements (Tiësto, Steve Aoki, Alesso, Wax Motif) while LIV Beach lacks similar high-profile talent callouts.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Update LIV Beach posts to highlight Kettama residency and Matroda consistency with talent tags.

content_gaps.description: OMNIA Dayclub opened at Caesars with heavy promotion (opening weekend posts, TikTok virality), Palm Tree Beach Club established new luxury dayclub positioning at MGM. LIV Beach has weaker dayclub content differentiation.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Increase LIV Beach daytime content (cabana/daybed reservations, Après parties) to compete with new entrants.

content_gaps.description: Competitors (XS, Hakkasan, Zouk) are securing influencer mentions and featured creator content more aggressively.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Outreach to Vegas club promoters and TikTok creators (@normanjay_lasvegas style influencers) for LIV mentions.
